text: A sugar pill can actually reduce pain, but how? It's not just in your head. The placebo effect is real biology. When we expect relief, our brains release natural opioids. Clinical studies show that context and expectation shape our pain perception. So, the next time you hear 'it's all in your head', remember: your brain changes reality. Curious about how your mind influences your body? Like and follow for more science insights!
